headline: American Express announced an increase in its quarterly dividend on common shares from $0.82 to $0.95 per share.
investor_impact: The nearly 16% increase in the quarterly dividend signals strong management confidence in ongoing cash flow generation and capital adequacy. This shareholder-friendly move enhances the stock's yield profile and reinforces a positive outlook on the company's fundamental earnings power.
key_figures: $0.95 new quarterly dividend per common share
$0.82 previous quarterly dividend per common share
